Name: Repo + Next.js App Router bootstrap
Acceptance Criteria: App corre local; rutas base / y /app; lint + format OK

Name: Tailwind + design tokens setup
Acceptance Criteria: Tokens (colors/spacing/radius) definidos; UI consistente; build sin warnings

Name: Supabase project setup (DB/Auth/Storage)
Acceptance Criteria: Proyecto Supabase creado; env vars configuradas; conexión desde Next OK

Name: Supabase client (server/client) + helpers
Acceptance Criteria: Clientes configurados para Server Components y Client Components; manejo de sesión OK

Name: Auth: Email/Password (sign up/in/out)
Acceptance Criteria: Registro/login/logout funciona; rutas /app protegidas; errores visibles y manejados

Name: Auth: Google OAuth
Acceptance Criteria: Login Google funciona; callback OK; sesión persistente

Name: DB: schema inicial (tablas core)
Acceptance Criteria: Tablas: users_profile, finance_profiles, profile_members, user_preferences, categories creadadas

Name: DB: triggers post-signup + defaults
Acceptance Criteria: Al registrarse: users_profile creado; finance_profile default creado; membership owner creada; active_profile_id seteado

Name: RBAC: funciones helper SQL (is_profile_member/can_edit/is_owner)
Acceptance Criteria: Funciones SQL creadas y testeadas con consultas manuales

Name: RLS: políticas base por profile_id
Acceptance Criteria: RLS activo en tablas; viewer solo lectura; editor/owner mutan; bloqueo cross-profile verificado

Name: Seed: categorías base por perfil
Acceptance Criteria: Categorías system income/expense disponibles al crear perfil

Name: App shell: layout + navegación + rutas
Acceptance Criteria: Topbar/sidebar; rutas: Overview/Transactions/Budgets/Pots/Recurring; responsive básico

Name: Profile Switcher UI (lista de perfiles)
Acceptance Criteria: Dropdown con perfiles miembro; muestra activo; UI recarga datos al cambiar

Name: Active profile persist (user_preferences + cookie SSR)
Acceptance Criteria: activeProfileId persiste; SSR consistente; refresh mantiene perfil

Name: API: POST /api/profiles/switch
Acceptance Criteria: Cambia active_profile_id; set-cookie seguro; valida membresía

Name: Storage buckets privados (avatars/receipts) + policies
Acceptance Criteria: Buckets privados; paths /profile_id/...; signed URLs cortas; acceso solo por membresía

Name: Soft delete baseline pattern (deleted_at) + filtros
Acceptance Criteria: Convención documentada; queries excluyen deleted_at por defecto

Name: Types TS + Zod base (Role/Money/entities)
Acceptance Criteria: Tipos y schemas para create/update; validación en server actions/APIs

Name: CI basics (lint/typecheck/build)
Acceptance Criteria: Pipeline simple; build pasa

Name: DB: transactions + attachments tables
Acceptance Criteria: Tablas transactions + transaction_attachments creadas; indexes básicos

Name: RLS policies: transactions + attachments
Acceptance Criteria: Viewer read; editor/owner write; bloqueo cross-profile

Name: API: GET /api/transactions (filters/pagination)
Acceptance Criteria: Filtros por texto/categoría/fecha; orden; paginación; solo activeProfileId

Name: API: POST /api/transactions (create)
Acceptance Criteria: Crea income/expense; valida amount_cents; created_by set

Name: API: PATCH /api/transactions/:id (update)
Acceptance Criteria: Edita campos permitidos; respeta RLS

Name: API: DELETE /api/transactions/:id (soft delete) + restore action
Acceptance Criteria: Soft delete set deleted_at; restaurar limpia deleted_at; listas no muestran borrados

Name: Transactions UI: list + search/filter/sort/pagination
Acceptance Criteria: UI usable; estados loading/empty/error; queries por perfil activo

Name: Transactions UI: create/edit modal/form
Acceptance Criteria: Validación Zod; feedback; refleja en lista

Name: CSV Import: upload + mapping UI + preview
Acceptance Criteria: Sube CSV; mapea columnas; preview filas; muestra errores por fila

Name: API: POST /api/transactions/import-csv (validate+insert)
Acceptance Criteria: Valida por fila; transacciones insertadas; summary de resultados

Name: Attachments: upload receipt to Storage + link to transaction
Acceptance Criteria: Sube archivo; guarda metadata; download via signed URL

Name: Transactions restore UI + view deleted (optional toggle)
Acceptance Criteria: Toggle para ver eliminados; restaurar desde UI

Name: DB: budgets table + constraint unique active per category
Acceptance Criteria: Budgets con is_active; unicidad categoría activa por perfil

Name: RLS: budgets policies
Acceptance Criteria: Viewer read; editor/owner write

Name: API: budgets CRUD endpoints
Acceptance Criteria: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE (soft); validación; errores claros

Name: View SQL: v_budget_progress_month
Acceptance Criteria: Spent vs limit por categoría en mes actual; sólo no deleted

Name: Budgets UI: list + create/edit + progress bars
Acceptance Criteria: Progreso coincide con suma de gastos; remaining correcto; evita duplicados

Name: DB: pots + pot_movements tables
Acceptance Criteria: Tablas pots y movimientos creadas; indexes básicos

Name: RLS: pots + pot_movements policies
Acceptance Criteria: Viewer read; editor/owner write

Name: Guardrail SQL: prevent overallocation (sum pots <= real_balance)
Acceptance Criteria: No permite add que deje sum(pots) > balance real; error controlado

Name: View SQL: v_profile_balances (real/pots/available)
Acceptance Criteria: Calcula real_balance; pots_allocated; available_to_spend; validado con casos

Name: API: pots CRUD + add/withdraw endpoints
Acceptance Criteria: Add/Withdraw crea movimiento; actualiza current_amount; respeta guardrail

Name: Pots UI: list + create/edit + add/withdraw flows
Acceptance Criteria: Movimientos reflejan current_amount; available_to_spend cambia; real_balance no cambia

Name: Dashboard widgets base (balances/budgets/pots)
Acceptance Criteria: Tarjetas muestran datos correctos y por perfil activo

Name: DB: recurring_bills + payments tables
Acceptance Criteria: Tablas recurring_bills y recurring_bill_payments creadas

Name: RLS: recurring bills + payments policies
Acceptance Criteria: Viewer read; editor/owner write

Name: Date calc: next_due_date advance logic (weekly/monthly/quarterly/yearly + interval_count)
Acceptance Criteria: Avanza fecha correctamente; maneja edge cases (fin de mes) documentados

Name: View SQL: v_recurring_due (upcoming/due soon/overdue)
Acceptance Criteria: Clasifica por fechas y reminder_days_before; sólo activos y no deleted

Name: API: recurring bills CRUD endpoints
Acceptance Criteria: CRUD con soft delete; validación; filtro por perfil activo

Name: API: POST /api/recurring-bills/:id/mark-paid (create tx + payment + advance)
Acceptance Criteria: Crea transacción gasto; crea payment con tx_id; avanza next_due_date; idempotencia básica

Name: Recurring Bills UI: list + status chips + create/edit
Acceptance Criteria: Upcoming/due soon/overdue visibles; permisos aplican (viewer read-only)

Name: Recurring Bills UI: mark as paid flow + confirmation
Acceptance Criteria: Mark as paid crea tx visible en Transactions; next_due_date cambia; feedback OK

Name: In-app alerts (query-only) for due soon/overdue
Acceptance Criteria: Campanita o panel muestra alerts; marcar read opcional

Name: Overview final: KPIs (balance/income/expenses)
Acceptance Criteria: KPIs correctos (mes actual); por perfil activo

Name: Overview: latest transactions widget
Acceptance Criteria: Últimas transacciones; navegación a Transactions

Name: RBAC UI hardening (hide/disable actions by role)
Acceptance Criteria: Viewer no ve acciones mutables; rutas sensibles protegidas

Name: RLS audit checklist + manual penetration attempts
Acceptance Criteria: Intentos de acceder otro profile fallan (API/SQL); evidencias registradas

Name: Performance pass: indexes + query review + pagination defaults
Acceptance Criteria: Listas paginadas; tiempos aceptables; indexes en profile_id/date

Name: Accessibility pass (keyboard
column12: Navegación por teclado; formularios con labels; focus visible

Name: Error handling + empty states polish
Acceptance Criteria: Mensajes claros; empty states consistentes; toasts
